questions.text: What does the word "artificial" mean in the context of Artificial Intelligence (AI)?
questions.explanation: Artificial means man-made (not naturally occurring).

questions.text: What does the word "intelligence" mean in general?

options.text: The ability to think, learn, and solve problems

questions.explanation: Intelligence is the ability to think, learn, understand, and solve problems.

questions.text: What is Artificial Intelligence (AI)?

options.text: Ability of machines to think, learn, and make decisions like humans

questions.explanation: AI enables machines to think, learn, and perform tasks requiring human-like intelligence.

questions.text: Why was Artificial Intelligence developed? (Select all that apply)

options.text: To make human work easier and more efficient
To process large amounts of information quickly
To reduce human effort in tasks

questions.explanation: AI was created to ease human work and handle big data quickly.

questions.text: How does an AI system learn to perform tasks?

options.text: By analyzing large amounts of data
By finding patterns in the data

questions.explanation: AI learns from large datasets, finds patterns, and improves with training.

questions.text: Which of the following tasks are examples of what AI can do? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: AI includes speech recognition and image classification, and can make data-driven decisions.

questions.text: Which of the following are examples of voice assistants? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Voice assistants include Google Assistant, Siri, and Alexa (not Google Maps).

questions.text: Which of the following are examples of recommendation systems? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Video apps suggesting videos you may like
A mail app sending unread mails
Online stores showing products you may want

questions.explanation: Recommendation systems suggest videos, songs, and products based on user behavior.

questions.text: Which of the following information do navigation apps provide using AI? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Fastest driving route to a destination

questions.explanation: Navigation apps use AI to find the fastest route, estimate time, and show traffic conditions.

questions.text: The image shows a smartphone using a camera with boxes around a face. Which AI application does this illustrate?
questions.explanation: The image illustrates face recognition (locking/unlocking phone by face).

questions.text: This image shows an aerial drone flying over crops. How does AI help farmers in this context? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Monitoring crop health via sensors or drones
Using drones to spray pesticides or fertilizer

questions.explanation: AI helps predict weather, monitor crops, and control drones for spraying, increasing efficiency.

questions.text: The person in this image is a doctor analyzing medical data on computers. How does AI assist in healthcare? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: AI helps analyze reports and detect diseases early (and can assist in surgery).

questions.text: In which way is AI used in education? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Providing online learning tools and tutorials
Answering students' questions using AI tutors
Teaching physical education in gym class

questions.explanation: AI provides online tools, answers questions, and generates practice tests for personalized learning.

questions.text: The image shows a Waymo autonomous vehicle. Which AI application does this represent?
questions.explanation: Waymo vehicles illustrate self-driving car technology, an AI application in transportation.

questions.text: What are some advantages of Artificial Intelligence? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Works faster than humans on many tasks
Processes large amounts of data quickly
Can work continuously without getting tired

questions.explanation: AI can work faster, handle big data, and run continuously without fatigue.

questions.text: What are some disadvantages of AI? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Cannot fully replace human thinking or emotions
May lead to reduction of some jobs

questions.explanation: AI can be costly, lacks human emotion, and may reduce jobs (while needing power/internet).

questions.text: Which of the following are potential future developments of AI? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Future AI may enable smart cities, medical advances, and more intelligent robots.

questions.text: In which of these fields is AI already helping people, as mentioned in the content? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: AI is used in agriculture, education, healthcare, and also transportation.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT typically done by AI today?
questions.explanation: AI can recognize speech, identify images, and analyze problems, but does not literally wash clothes.

questions.text: Which of the following tasks can voice assistants perform? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Voice assistants can make calls, send messages, and set reminders (they do not fly drones).

questions.text: The image shows an Amazon Echo Dot smart speaker. Which category of device is this?
questions.explanation: Amazon Echo Dot is a voice-controlled smart speaker (digital assistant device).

questions.text: This image shows a smart urban farm. Which area of AI use does it represent?
questions.explanation: The image of a smart farm illustrates AI applied in agriculture (e.g., automated farming methods).

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT an example of AI in the context given?
questions.explanation: A simple calculator performing arithmetic is not considered AI (it's basic computing).

questions.text: Which of the following tasks are commonly done by voice assistants? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Voice assistants can make calls, send texts, and set reminders; they do not automatically take photos.

questions.text: Which of these devices often use face recognition technology? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Face recognition is used in smartphone unlocking and some security systems, not in mechanical locks or watches.

questions.text: What is a benefit of using recommendation systems on video/music apps?

options.text: It suggests new content based on your preferences
It randomly plays videos without pattern
It increases your computer's battery usage

questions.explanation: Recommendation systems suggest videos or songs based on user likes and behavior.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT an advantage of AI?

options.text: Processes large amounts of data quickly
Works faster than humans on many tasks

questions.explanation: AI does not have human-like creativity or emotions; that is not listed as an advantage here.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a disadvantage of AI?

options.text: May lead to loss of some jobs

questions.explanation: Claiming AI fully replaces human intuition is incorrect (AI can't fully mimic human creativity/emotion).

questions.text: Which of the following describe how AI learns? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: AI learns by detecting data patterns and improving with practice; it does not guess randomly without data.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a method AI uses to learn?
questions.explanation: AI does not rely on random guessing without data; it uses data-driven learning methods instead.

questions.text: Which field was NOT explicitly mentioned as using AI in the content?
questions.explanation: The content listed agriculture, education, healthcare, transportation, but not the entertainment industry specifically.

questions.text: How might AI be used in smart city planning? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: AI can optimize traffic, energy grids, and use weather predictions in smart cities (wildlife tracking is not city planning).

questions.text: Which of the following tasks become easier or faster with AI? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: AI excels at processing big data, doing repetitive tasks, understanding speech, and calculating optimal routes.

questions.text: Which of the following is currently NOT well performed by AI?

options.text: Learning and reasoning exactly like humans

questions.explanation: AI can identify images, make recommendations, convert speech to text, but true human-like reasoning is not yet achieved.

questions.text: Which of the following statements about AI are correct? (Select all that apply)

options.text: AI can continuously work without fatigue
AI processes large amounts of data fast

questions.explanation: AI can work without getting tired and handle big data fast, but it does not have emotions or always perfect answers.

questions.text: Which of the following are examples of AI technologies? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Machine learning and neural networks are AI techniques; touchscreens and basic calculator chips are not AI.

questions.text: Which of the following things can AI do today? (Select all that apply)

options.text: Drive cars autonomously on some roads

questions.explanation: AI can translate languages, create simple art, and drive cars (it cannot teleport objects).

questions.text: AI is mentioned in all of these fields EXCEPT:
questions.explanation: The content mentions agriculture, healthcare, education, transportation; it does not specifically mention mining.

questions.text: Which of these statements about AI is TRUE?

options.text: AI can work continuously without fatigue.
AI requires no power or data.

questions.explanation: AI can work continuously without getting tired, unlike humans (the other statements are false).

questions.text: Which of these cannot be done by current AI systems?
questions.explanation: Current AI cannot truly perform emotional/creative tasks like a human (it handles speech, weather, and images).

questions.text: The image shows a human brain made of circuits. What concept is being illustrated?
questions.explanation: A brain of circuits symbolizes AI - machines mimicking human thinking (artificial intelligence).

questions.text: The image shows heavy road traffic. Which AI application area can help manage this situation?
questions.explanation: AI-driven traffic management systems help optimize traffic flow and reduce congestion.

questions.text: This image shows a robot at an airport. What AI-related field does this best represent?
questions.explanation: The airport robot exemplifies autonomous robots and intelligent machines, a future AI application.

questions.text: This futuristic city image illustrates which concept?

options.text: A smart city managed by AI

questions.explanation: The image represents a smart city of the future, an area where AI can manage infrastructure.

questions.text: Which of these statements correctly describes AI learning from data?

options.text: AI improves its performance as it is trained with more examples
AI performance gets worse with more data
AI learning does not depend on the amount of data
AI forgets patterns when trained more

questions.explanation: AI learns better with more training data, improving its task performance over time.

questions.text: Which of the following is an example of AI making life easier?

options.text: A voice assistant setting reminders automatically
A bicycle pedaled by a person

questions.explanation: Voice assistants (AI) can automate tasks like setting reminders, making life easier.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a way AI is used responsibly for a better future?

options.text: Building smart cities with better planning

questions.explanation: Replacing all human teachers is not realistic; AI aids education but doesn't fully replace human teachers.

questions.text: All of the following are potential benefits of AI except:
questions.explanation: AI needs electricity and data; 'requiring no electricity' is not a benefit of AI.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT considered an AI application in daily life?
questions.explanation: Smartwatches or wristwatches are not AI; voice assistants, navigation, and face unlock use AI.

questions.text: All of the following fields use AI except:
questions.explanation: AI is used in healthcare, education, agriculture, but 'space travel planning' was not mentioned in the content.
